name_en: [Size Change Chip Version] Model: M12099 Small This piece 🔥 double-sided use Legendary Neverfull BB: always meets your tote needs. Spacious yet not bulky, structured yet soft, suitable for home or travel. Tighten side ties to instantly transform into a chic city bag. Loosen ties to become a unique and practical handbag. Long leather handle is suitable for shoulder or arm carry. Shown here in Damier Azur canvas.
